chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-255 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.1572/2021 (urgent application) 2. For orders on office objection(s) appearing on reverse of memo of petition. 3. For orders on M.A. No.1573/2021 (exemption application) 4. For hearing of main case 03.03.2021 Mr. Tariq Ali Narai advocate for petitioners. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2to4. Learned counsel does not press this petition as the petitioners intend to avail their remedy before the proper forum in accordance with law. In view of the above, the petition and listed applications are dismissed as not pressed with no order as to costs leaving the petitioners at liberty to avail their remedy, if any, before the competent forum in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Ali Haider
